posts.author: RoninIV
posts.title: It's that time again...

posts.raw_content:
Remembering how my parents had such a large house and land. 

Looking back at the time I bought my first house used for around $100k and seeing that the original owner paid $25k when it was built. 

Knowing that when I'm done paying off my house that it will possibly be worth $400k.

Feeling sad that future generations will rent and never own, never know the feeling of owning.

Noticing that as long as we pay a property tax, we never really owned it to begin with.
